$schema.title: Registry Schema URL
$schema.description: The Schema URL, which should be `https://weme-ui.github.io/schema/v3/registry.schema.json`

name.title: Registry Name
name.description: The name of the registry, in the format of `owner/repo`.

defaultPrefix.title: Default Library Prefix
defaultPrefix.description: The default prefix of the library.

scope.title: Item Scope
scope.description: The scope of the registry library item.

name.title: Item Name
name.description: The name of the registry library item.

description.title: Item Description
description.description: The description of the registry library item.

dependencies.title: Item Dependencies
dependencies.description: The package dependencies of the registry library item.

devDependencies.title: Item Dev Dependencies
devDependencies.description: The package dev dependencies of the registry library item.

localDependencies.title: Item Dependencies In The Same Registry
localDependencies.description: The local dependencies of the registry library item.

files.title: Item Files
files.description: The files of the registry library item.

type.title: Registry Item File Type
type.description: The type of the registry item file.

path.title: Registry Item File Path
path.description: The path of the registry item file.

target.title: Registry Item File Target
target.description: The target of the registry item file.

hash.title: Registry Item File Hash
hash.description: The hash of the registry item file.

type.title: Registry Item File Type
type.description: The type of the registry item file.

path.title: Registry Item File Path
path.description: The path of the registry item file.

target.title: Registry Item File Target
target.description: The target of the registry item file.

hash.title: Registry Item File Hash
hash.description: The hash of the registry item file.

items.title: Registry Item File
items.description: A file in the registry library item.

cssVariables.title: Item CSS Variables
cssVariables.description: The CSS variables of the registry library item.

items.title: Registry Library Item
items.description: An item in the registry library.

hash.title: Registry Hash
hash.description: The SHA1 hash of the registry, DO NOT edit this manually.

lastUpdated.title: Last Updated
lastUpdated.description: The last updated of the registry, DO NOT edit this manually.

title: Weme UI Registry JSON Schema Definitions (v3)
description: This schema defines the structure of the registry JSON file used in Weme UI.
